name: compliance-checklist
description: Provides a checklist framework for surfacing potentially applicable application-compliance obligations across declared jurisdictions (Japan / EU / US-CA / platform stores). The Skill is invoked by product-manager, security-reviewer, and technical-writer when a capability that may have legal exposure is added (chat / payments / PII collection / data export). It emits a checklist with primary-source citations and a mandatory disclaimer block; it never marks items as "complied with" — only the human reviewer can.
